home.title: Identity Management System
home.subtitle: Secure, privacy-first identity management across multiple contexts

privacy.title: Privacy by Design
privacy.description: Built with GDPR-inspired principles for maximum data protection

contexts.title: Multi-Context Identity
contexts.description: Manage different personas for professional, social, and personal use

auth.verifyEmailMessage: Please check your inbox and click the verification link we sent you.
auth.verifyEmailSent: We've sent a verification link to {email}
auth.emailVerifiedMessage: Your email has been verified successfully. You can now access all features.
auth.verificationEmailSent: A new verification email has been sent.
auth.forgotPasswordMessage: Enter your email and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive password reset instructions.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now login with your new password.
auth.invalidResetToken: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

accountType.label: Account type
accountType.unverifiedDescription: Limited access until email is verified

restore.title: Restore Account
restore.description: Enter the email address associated with your deleted account. If a recoverable account exists, we will send a restoration link.
restore.emailSentMessage: If a recoverable account exists for this email, you will receive a restoration link shortly.
restore.restoringMessage: Please wait while we restore your account...
restore.confirmDescription: Choose a new password for your restored account.
restore.confirmSuccessMessage: Your account has been restored. You can now log in with your new password.
restore.invalidTokenMessage: This restoration link is invalid or has expired.
restore.permanentlyDeletedMessage: The 30-day grace period has expired and this account has been permanently deleted. You may register a new account.
restore.accountDeletedMessage: Your account is scheduled for deletion. It will be permanently erased on {date}.
restore.recoveryInstructions: You can restore your account within the grace period by requesting a restoration link.
restore.accountRecoverableMessage: An account with this email exists and can be restored until {date}.

social.processingMessage: Please wait while we complete your sign in.
social.loginSuccess: Welcome back! You've successfully signed in.
social.invalidCallback: Invalid OAuth callback: missing code or state parameter.
social.sessionExpired: OAuth session expired. Please try signing in again.
social.accountLinkingInfo: This email is already registered with a password. Please sign in with your password, or contact support to link your Google account.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.emailChangeWarning: Changing your email will require re-verification

avatar.title: Profile Picture
avatar.fileTooLarge: File size must not exceed 5 MB

context.title: Identity Contexts
context.description: Manage different identity contexts for various aspects of your life
context.createDescription: Create a new identity context for a specific purpose or domain
context.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this context? This action cannot be undone.
context.name: Context Name
context.nameHint: A descriptive name to identify this context
context.bioPlaceholder: A brief description for this context
context.isActiveHint: Inactive contexts won't be visible to third-party applications
context.inheritFromProfile: Leave empty to inherit from base profile
context.overridesDescription: These values will override your base profile when using this context. Leave empty to use your base profile values.
context.pseudonymousRestriction: Note: Pseudonymous accounts cannot create legal or healthcare contexts.

restrictions.pseudonymousLegal: Pseudonymous accounts cannot create legal contexts
restrictions.pseudonymousHealthcare: Pseudonymous accounts cannot create healthcare contexts

avatar.uploadFailed: Context created, but the avatar upload failed. You can retry from the detail page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences
settings.setPasswordDescription: You signed in with {provider}. Set a password to also login with email and password.
settings.setPasswordSuccess: Password set successfully. You can now sign in with both {provider} and email/password.
settings.setPasswordAlreadySet: Password already set. Use Change Password to update it.
settings.setPasswordNotOAuth: Password can only be set for OAuth-registered accounts.
settings.deleteAccountWarning: Your account will enter a 30-day grace period. After that, all data will be permanently erased.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: Your account and all associated data will be soft-deleted. You have 30 days to restore it before permanent erasure.

deletion.scheduledBanner: Your account is scheduled for deletion on {date}. You can restore it by logging in again.
deletion.scheduledMessage: Your account has been scheduled for deletion.
deletion.graceMessage: You have 30 days to restore your account. After that date, all data will be permanently erased.
deletion.logoutNotice: You will be logged out shortly.
deletion.alreadyDeleted: Account is already scheduled for deletion

settings.privacyDataDescription: Download a copy of all personal data held by this system, as provided by GDPR Article 15.
settings.connectedAppsDescription: Manage applications that have access to your data.

privacy.title: Data Export
privacy.description: All personal data held by this system, per GDPR Article 15 (Right of Access).

oauth.title: Authorization Request
oauth.selectContextDescription: Choose which identity profile you want to share with this application.
oauth.processingMessage: Please wait while we complete your authentication.
oauth.connectedAppsDescription: Applications you have authorized to access your identity data.
oauth.noConnectedAppsDescription: Applications you authorize through OAuth will appear here. You can revoke access at any time.
oauth.revokeConfirmMessage: This will revoke all tokens for {client}. The application will need to request authorization again.
oauth.dataPreviewDescription: Fields that will be shared based on selected permissions.
oauth.rememberDecisionDescription: Skip this screen next time this application requests the same permissions.

errors.stateMismatch: Security validation failed. Please try again.

detection.title: We detected: {pattern}
detection.chooseDifferent: No, let me choose a different format
detection.keepSimple: Keep it simple - use as entered

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.description: Review the history of actions performed on your account

empty.title: No audit entries
empty.description: There are no audit log entries matching your filters.

verify.title: Audit Log Integrity
verify.description: Verify the cryptographic hash chain of audit log entries to detect tampering
verify.entriesHint: Number of recent entries to check (1 - 10,000)
verify.validExplanation: All {count} audit log entries have valid hash chain linkage. No tampering detected.
verify.invalidExplanation: The hash chain verification failed, indicating possible tampering with audit log entries.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.pageNotFoundMessage: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
